deep_dive.title: Wan-Streamer v0.1: End-to-end Real-time Interactive Foundation Models
deep_dive.abstract: We present Wan-Streamer, a native-streaming, end-to-end interactive foundation model designed from the ground up for real-time, low-latency, full-duplex audio-visual interaction. Wan-Streamer seamlessly models language, audio, and video as both input and output within a single Transformer, where the sequence is represented as interleaved visual, audio, and text input tokens together with visual, audio, and text output tokens, coordinated by block-causal attention for incremental streaming. Unlike cascaded interactive systems that rely on separate VAD, ASR, language, TTS, audio-driven animation, or video-generation modules, Wan-Streamer does not rely on external language, speech, avatar, or video-generation modules: perception, reasoning, generation, response timing, turn management, and cross-modal synchronization are learned jointly within one unified model, reducing pipeline latency and error accumulation. To support natural audio-visual responsiveness, we redesign the entire stack around streamability, including causal encoders, causal decoders, block-causal attention, and low-latency multimodal token scheduling, enabling streaming units as short as 160 ms at 25 fps. Wan-Streamer achieves approximately 200 ms model-side response latency and approximately 550 ms total interaction latency when combined with 350 ms bidirectional network latency, supporting sub-second duplex audio-visual communication. These results position Wan-Streamer as a unified, end-to-end, multimodal interactive foundation model for low-latency streaming interaction.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Wan-Streamer is an end-to-end multimodal foundation model for audio-visual interaction, directly aligning with WAN architecture for multimodal generation
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: Wan-Streamer是一个端到端多模态基础模型，用于音视频交互，直接对应WAN多模态生成架构
deep_dive.llm_evidence: Wan-Streamer是一个端到端多模态基础模型，用于音视频交互，直接对应WAN多模态生成架构
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: Wan-Streamer是一个端到端多模态基础模型，用于音视频交互，直接对应WAN多模态生成架构
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Wan-Streamer is a native-streaming transformer that models language, audio, and video as both input and output, enabling real-time full-duplex audio-visual interaction without external modules.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: Wan-Streamer是一个原生流式端到端交互基础模型，通过单一Transformer联合建模语言、音频和视频的输入与输出，实现实时全双工音视频交互，无需外部语音或视频生成模块。该方法解决了传统级联系统模块繁多、延迟高的问题，在统一架构下完成感知、推理与生成。实验表明其能实现低延迟高质量的多模态交互，为实时音视频AI应用提供了新的基础框架。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: Wan-Streamer是一个原生流式端到端交互基础模型，通过单一Transformer联合建模语言、音频和视频的输入与输出，实现实时全双工音视频交互，无需外部语音或视频生成模块。该方法解决了传统级联系统模块繁多、延迟高的问题，在统一架构下完成感知、推理与生成。实验表明其能实现低延迟高质量的多模态交互，为实时音视频AI应用提供了新的基础框架。

deep_dive.title: FacePlex: Full-Duplex Joint Speech-Facial Motion Generation for Conversational Avatars
deep_dive.abstract: Natural face-to-face conversation requires real-time speech generation together with synchronized facial motion. Existing systems only partially address this problem: speech-only full-duplex models can generate speech in real time but do not produce facial motion, while audio-driven facial motion models animate a face from already available audio rather than jointly generating speech and motion online. To bridge this gap, we first formalize full-duplex joint speech-facial motion generation, where speech tokens and facial motion tokens are produced together every step. Building on this formulation, we propose FacePlex, a unified streaming framework with two key components. First, Rolling Flow Matching adapts flow matching to online motion generation by committing new motion frames at each streaming step. Second, Rolling Cross-Attention couples the streaming audio queue with the motion queue, allowing speech and facial motion to condition each other as generation progresses. Through extensive experiments, ablation studies, and a user study, we show that FacePlex enables full-duplex joint speech-facial motion generation under online streaming constraints, while achieving stronger lip-sync quality and motion fidelity than audio-driven facial motion baselines.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Joint speech-facial motion generation with audio-driven lip motion synthesis for avatars
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 面向化身的音频驱动唇动合成联合语音面部运动生成
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 面向化身的音频驱动唇动合成联合语音面部运动生成
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 面向化身的音频驱动唇动合成联合语音面部运动生成
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: FacePlex introduces a full-duplex streaming framework that jointly generates speech and audio-driven facial motion (including lip sync) in real time for conversational avatars, using Rolling Flow Matching and a two-stage training scheme.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有对话系统无法实时同时生成语音与同步面部运动的问题，本文提出FacePlex，一种全双工流式框架，将语音生成与音频驱动的面部运动（包括唇动）统一为每一步联合生成过程。通过滚动流匹配和两阶段训练，模型实现低延迟的自然对话化身动画，显著提升了在线交互中的唇音同步精度。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对现有对话系统无法实时同时生成语音与同步面部运动的问题，本文提出FacePlex，一种全双工流式框架，将语音生成与音频驱动的面部运动（包括唇动）统一为每一步联合生成过程。通过滚动流匹配和两阶段训练，模型实现低延迟的自然对话化身动画，显著提升了在线交互中的唇音同步精度。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Image to video generation with audio driven lip motion synthesis.

deep_dive.title: KM-Speaker: Keypoint-Based Style Control for High-Quality Speech-Driven 3D Facial Animation and Dialogue Localization
deep_dive.abstract: Speech-driven 3D facial animation methods face significant challenges in simultaneously achieving high-fidelity motion and precise artistic control at production quality. Existing controllable models typically learn global style control by relying on large-scale, low-quality \emph{in-the-wild} datasets that compromise overall animation realism. Furthermore, these frameworks often lack the fine-grained temporal precision required for demanding tasks such as dialogue localization (e.g., dubbing), where matching specific facial expressions is as critical as lip synchronization. We present KM-Speaker (Keypoint-Matching Speaker), a novel keypoint-conditioned flow-based generative framework that provides both global style guidance and frame-level temporal control from reference performances. We propose a disentanglement strategy that separates audio-driven lip motion from keypoint-driven upper-face dynamics, together with a global style context preservation mechanism to ensure coherent full-face expressiveness. KM-Speaker advances example-based 3D facial animation by achieving high-fidelity motion and flexible controllability in a data-constrained setting, consistently outperforming state-of-the-art methods in lip-sync accuracy, style adherence, and expressive temporal control.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: speech-driven 3D facial animation with precise lip synchronization and dialogue localization
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 语音驱动3D面部动画，具有精确唇形同步和对话定位
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 语音驱动3D面部动画，具有精确唇形同步和对话定位
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 语音驱动3D面部动画，具有精确唇形同步和对话定位
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: KM-Speaker introduces a keypoint-conditioned flow-based generative framework for high-quality speech-driven 3D facial animation, achieving global style control and fine-grained temporal precision for tasks like dubbing with accurate lip sync.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 语言驱动的3D面部动画方法难以同时实现高保真运动和精确的艺术控制，且缺乏细粒度时序精度用于配音等需要精确唇形同步的任务。该论文提出KM-Speaker，一种基于关键点调节的流式生成框架，在提供全局风格控制的同时，通过关键点匹配实现毫秒级时序精度。实验表明，该方法在唇形同步和面部表情再现上均优于现有技术，为高质量语音动画和配音应用提供了有力工具。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 语言驱动的3D面部动画方法难以同时实现高保真运动和精确的艺术控制，且缺乏细粒度时序精度用于配音等需要精确唇形同步的任务。该论文提出KM-Speaker，一种基于关键点调节的流式生成框架，在提供全局风格控制的同时，通过关键点匹配实现毫秒级时序精度。实验表明，该方法在唇形同步和面部表情再现上均优于现有技术，为高质量语音动画和配音应用提供了有力工具。
